debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
mα : MeasurableSpace α
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
inst✝⁷ : DecidableEq α
inst✝⁶ : StandardBorelSpace α
inst✝⁵ : Nonempty α
A : ℕ → Ω → α
R : ℕ → Ω → ℝ
P : Measure Ω
inst✝⁴ : IsProbabilityMeasure P
alg : Algorithm α ℝ
ν : Kernel α ℝ
inst✝³ : IsMarkovKernel ν
inst✝² : StandardBorelSpace Ω
inst✝¹ : Nonempty Ω
inst✝ : Countable α
h : IsAlgEnvSeq A R alg (stationaryEnv ν) P
a b : α
hab : a ≠ b
⊢ IndepFun (fun ω s => rewardByCount A R a s ω) (fun ω s => rewardByCount A R b s ω) (P.prod (Bandit.streamMeasure ν))

failed_attempts:
have hA := h.measurable_A
  have hR := h.measurable_R
  refine IndepFun.pi (fun i ↦ ?_) (fun i ↦ ?_) (fun i ↦ ?_)
  · exact (identDistrib_rewardByCount_id h a i.succ (by simp)).symm.indepFun_of_ident
  · exact (identDistrib_rewardByCount_id h b i.succ (by simp)).symm.indepFun_of_ident
  · exact IndepFun_const (ν a) (ν b)

refine IndepFun.pi (fun i ↦ ?_) ?_ ?_
  · exact indepFun_rewardByCount_of_ne_aux h hab
  · exact iIndepFun_rewardByCount' h a
  · exact iIndepFun_rewardByCount' h b

have hA := h.measurable_A
  have hR := h.measurable_R
  refine IndepFun.of_iIndepFun _ _
  · exact iIndepFun_rewardByCount h
  · intro i j hij

      exists_eq_left, and_true, true_and, Prod.forall, forall_eq, forall_const]
    rintro ⟨a', n⟩ ⟨b', m⟩
    simp only [Ne, Prod.mk.injEq, and_imp, forall_apply_eq_imp_iff₂]
    intro h₁ h₂
    cases' h₁ with rfl h₁ <;> cases' h₂ with rfl h₂ <;> simp_all

refine IndepFun.pi (fun i ↦ ?_) (fun i ↦ ?_) (fun i j ↦ ?_)
  · exact identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream h a
  · exact identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream h b
  · exact fun _ _ => iIndepFun_eval_streamMeasure_of_ne ν hab

have h_indep_stream : IndepFun (fun ω n ↦ ω n a) (fun ω n ↦ ω n b) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) :=
    Bandit.indepFun_eval_of_ne hab
  have h_ident_a : IdentDistrib (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R a s ω)
      (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 (s - 1) a) 𝔓' 𝔓 := by
    refine IdentDistrib.pi (fun s ↦ ?_) ?_ ?_
    · cases s
      · exact identDistrib_const_zero _ _ _ _
      · exact identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream h a
    · exact iIndepFun_rewardByCount' h a
    · change iIndepFun (fun s ↦ (fun ω ↦ ω.2 (s - 1) a)) 𝔓
      rw [← iIndepFun_map_iff (by fun_prop) (fun _ ↦ Measurable.aemeasurable (by fun_prop))]
      rw [← Measure.snd, Bandit.snd_measure]
      exact iIndepFun.precomp (g := fun s ↦ s - 1) (fun i j hij ↦ by simp_all [Nat.sub_eq_sub]) (iIndepFun_eval_streamMeasure'' ν a)
  have h_ident_b : IdentDistrib (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R b s ω)
      (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 (s - 1) b) 𝔓' 𝔓 := by
    refine IdentDistrib.pi (fun s ↦ ?_) ?_ ?_
    · cases s
      · exact identDistrib_const_zero _ _ _ _
      · exact identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream h b
    · exact iIndepFun_rewardByCount' h b
    · change iIndepFun (fun s ↦ (fun ω ↦ ω.2 (s - 1) b)) 𝔓
      rw [← iIndepFun_map_iff (by fun_prop) (fun _ ↦ Measurable.aemeasurable (by fun_prop))]
      rw [← Measure.snd, Bandit.snd_measure]
      exact iIndepFun.precomp (g := fun s ↦ s - 1) (fun i j hij ↦ by simp_all [Nat.sub_eq_sub]) (iIndepFun_eval_streamMeasure'' ν b)
  exact (IdentDistrib.indepFun_congr_left h_ident_a.symm).mpr
    ((IdentDistrib.indepFun_congr_right h_ident_b.symm).mpr
      (indepFun_prod_left_right h_indep_stream))

refine IndepFun.of_iIndepFun_of_disjoint (iIndepFun_rewardByCount h) ?_
  intro p q hpq
  simp only [Set.mem_range, Prod.exists, exists_and_right, exists_eq_right, and_imp]
  rintro ⟨n, rfl⟩ ⟨m, rfl⟩
  simp only [Ne, Prod.mk.inj_iff, not_and_or, not_not, eq_self_iff_true, and_true]
  exact hab

have h_indep_stream : IndepFun (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 s a) (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 s b) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) :=
    IndepFun.pi_right _ _ (fun _ ↦ measurable_prod_mk_right _) (fun _ ↦ measurable_prod_mk_right _)
      (fun i j _ => IndepFun.of_disjoint_singleton hab)
  exact (identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream h a).symm.indepFun_congr_left
    (identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream h b).symm.indepFun_congr_right h_indep_stream

refine IndepFun.of_iIndepFun_of_disjoint ?_ ?_
  · exact iIndepFun_rewardByCount h
  · intro p q hpq
    simp only [Prod.mk.injEq, Ne, not_and_or, Prod.exists, exists_and_right] at hpq
    obtain ⟨⟨ha, hb⟩ | ⟨hb, ha⟩⟩ := hpq
    · exact hab ha
    · exact hab.symm hb

have h_indep_stream : IndepFun (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 s a) (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 s b) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) :=

  have h_ident_a : IdentDistrib (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R a (s + 1) ω) (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 s a) 𝔓' 𝔓 :=

  have h_ident_b : IdentDistrib (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R b (s + 1) ω) (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 s b) 𝔓' 𝔓 :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream h b
  exact IndepFun.of_identDistrib h_ident_a h_ident_b h_indep_stream
